ext_description.message: Quickly archive to ChunChuGwan and view history

connect_intro.message: Connect by pasting an extension token issued in your dashboard account settings.

connect_warn.message: Paste the extension token from account settings — not your ChunChuGwan password.

archive_intro.message: Archive the page you are viewing, or the whole site.

archive_private_warn.message: Local network address — you may need to set a network tag in the dashboard.

login_desc.message: Captures once using your current login cookies. Only cookies are sent (no password or ID), and it is not used for scheduled re-archiving.

login_consent.message: I agree to send this site's auth cookies to the ChunChuGwan server once.

login_note.message: The capsule is deleted right after capture on the server (auto-expires as a fallback).

history_none.message: This URL has not been archived yet.

err_no_archive.message: This token does not have archive permission.

err_no_view.message: This token does not have view permission.

err_credential_disabled.message: Authenticated capture is disabled on the server.
